name: Goblin Sniper

traits.name: Squad
traits.description: This creature fights in squads of 8. When a minion in the squad takes damage equal to its stamina, it drops and the next minion acts.

name: Shadow Assassin

traits.name: Shadow Step
traits.description: As a maneuver, the shadow assassin can teleport up to 5 squares to an unoccupied space in shadow or darkness.

traits.name: Unseen Strike
traits.description: The shadow assassin deals an extra 5 damage to any creature that can't see it.

name: Young Fire Drake

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.description: Each creature that starts its turn adjacent to the drake takes 3 fire damage.

traits.name: Flight
traits.description: The drake can fly. While flying, it has a speed of 8.

name: Rat Swarm

traits.name: Swarm
traits.description: The rat swarm can occupy other creatures' spaces and vice versa. The swarm takes half damage from single-target attacks.

traits.name: Diseased Bites
traits.description: A creature that starts its turn in the swarm's space takes 2 poison damage.
